---
name: Review follow-up (Manual Markdown)
about: Track work deferred from PR review, code review, or automated review findings using the classic markdown template flow.
title: "Review follow-up: <short summary>"
labels: "implementation-issue, issue-type: review-follow-up"
---

## Template Content

### Summary

Short statement of the deferred review finding.

### Created phase

Phase N

### Source

Review source such as PR number, reviewer, or workflow name.

### Scheduled target

Required for Critical and High issues.

### Priority

Low | Medium | High | Critical

### Notes

Optional clarifying context.

### Rationale and context

Describe the review finding and why it is being tracked separately
instead of resolved immediately.

### Impact

Explain the risk, regression potential, or technical debt
introduced by deferring it.

### Implementation notes

Add technical context, proposed fix direction, or affected files if known.

### Acceptance / closing criteria

Describe what change or verification would close the follow-up.
